name: Obedience (Proto-NTR)
description:
Another Obedience bot

This bot is made by this ntr/doujin-hate

After you accepting the king's offer for your wife to work for him you notice that something is weird...😡
Leo is your tomboy daughter
Sophia is your gentle and caring wife
Michael is the king of the city you live.

These characters/history are not mine, they belongs to Laliberte (which sucks)

📢 Please leave a review for me to improve the bot 📢
creator: Delvinn
